skills.name: setup-tools
skills.description: Install, verify, and clean the pinned local development toolchain in ./bin.

skills.name: code-quality
skills.description: Format, tidy, vet, lint, and secret-scan before committing (the pre-commit/CI quality gate).

skills.name: implementation-plan
skills.description: Turn a task description (file path or inline text: what/where/constraints) into a detailed, ordered implementation plan written to a caller-chosen markdown file. Grounds the plan in the actual codebase; plans only, does not implement.

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Thorough, precise code review of a GitHub pull request in the agent thread using the gh CLI. Takes a PR number (or a branch to find its open PR) and an optional change description; emits a PASS / CHANGES REQUESTED verdict and a prioritized list of required fixes.

skills.name: unit-test
skills.description: Run controller integration tests (Ginkgo/envtest) against an existing cluster.

skills.name: generate-manifests
skills.description: Regenerate DeepCopy code, CRDs, RBAC, OLM bundle/CSV, and ArgoCD YAMLs after API changes.

skills.name: build-and-deploy
skills.description: Build the operator binary/image and run or deploy it against a cluster for local testing.

skills.name: build-helm-charts
skills.description: Build the development Helm charts for License Service, Reporter, and Scanner (no-operator path).

skills.name: contributing
skills.description: How to contribute quality changes: workflow, DCO, pre-PR checklist, generated files, version bumps.

skills.name: license-service-architecture
skills.description: How License Service is split across three separate repos - the operator (this repo), the operand (containerized License Service app), and the commons (shared library) - and how they interplay at build time and runtime. Does not assume the repos are checked out together.

skills.name: operator-sdk-guide
skills.description: How operator-sdk/kubebuilder works for this operator: CRDs, controllers, reconcile flow, markers, codegen.

skills.name: refresh-agents-md
skills.description: Keep the root AGENTS.md agent guide accurate and in sync with the Makefile, toolchain, architecture, versioning, and the .bob/skills/ catalog.

categories.quality: Code quality, linting, and security scanning
categories.planning: Turning a task into an actionable implementation plan
categories.review: Reviewing changes for correctness and quality
categories.build: Building, running, and deploying the operator
